Bash(awk '{cmd=$1; if \(cmd ~ /^source/\) {next}; if \(cmd ~ /&&/\) {split\($0,a,"&&"\); for\(i in a\){sub\(/^[ \\t]*/,"",a[i]\); split\(a[i],b," "\); cmd=b[1]; if\(cmd!=""\) counts[cmd]++}} else {counts[cmd]++}} END {for\(c in counts\) print counts[c], c}')
